meaning: n.包装纸,包装材料adj.包装用的
examples: Foil wrapping paper is beautiful but difficult to use.
Nick asked for the tile to be delivered in waterproof wrapping.
The store offers a gift-wrapping service.
So the future of cloud-based software is wrapping all these great applications in rich, highly-integrated data.
The rubbish is being compacted into plastic wrapping, capable of holding about half a tonne.
